title: The Alarm Snooze
narration: The alarm goes off at 6am. You hit snooze. Just five more minutes. Five minutes later, the alarm goes off again. You hit snooze again. This time you negotiate with yourself. If I skip breakfast, I can sleep ten more minutes. The alarm goes off a third time. Now you're bargaining with physics. If I don't wash my hair, I save seven minutes. If I speed a little, I save three. If I wear yesterday's outfit, that's another five. You are now running complex logistics in your head while half asleep. And then you check the time. It's 7:45. You needed to leave at 7:30. And somehow, you still make it. Barely. Every single day.

scenes.text: The alarm goes off at 6am. You hit snooze. Just five more minutes.

scenes.text: If I don't wash my hair, I save seven minutes. If I speed a little, I save three.

scenes.text: And then you check the time. It's 7:45. You needed to leave at 7:30.

scenes.text: And somehow, you still make it. Barely. Every single day.
